description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with clean, rectilinear forms and a flat green roof that extends over multiple sections. The structure is composed of several interconnected volumes, with large windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and natural wood, complemented by landscaped greenery and a small tree at the entrance. A spacious patio and a fenced area, possibly for a pool or outdoor seating, are visible on one side. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to create a terrace or balcony area. The overall layout is open and airy, with a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat green roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and wood exterior finishes, featuring landscaped areas and a spacious patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped greenery with a tree and patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat green roofs, fenced patio, and the staggered arrangement of the building volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extended green roof, upper terrace, and the overall length of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the layout of the roofs, terraces, and the spatial relationship between the different sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
